trainers.bioBodi: Two-time Mr. Israel is more than a big, buff guy. He’s an expert on how the human body operates. He’s appeared in thousands of bodybuilding magazines and had been on the cover of Muscle & Fitness an amazing 11 times. He’s a Master Professional Personal Trainer and an IFBB Propta Hall of Famer.

data.descriptionShort: Experience what it’s like to get one-on-one training with Sagi Kalev.
data.descriptionLong: Check out some of Sagi’s most unique content – from Sagi’s inspirational story, to exclusive workouts for BOD members, and even tips on how to prep for your next (or first) physique competition!

modules.equipment: Dumbbells, Olympic Bar, EZ Curl Bar, Cable Crossover, Bench, Power Tower, Preacher Bench, Roman Chair, Weight plates, Plyo Box*

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.
